balance_read_boundary.reason: Historical balance/equity state was wallet-owned Solana margin account data; runtime remains closed because the venue ceased operations and the SDK/account decoder, scope guard, slot/reorg policy, and reconciliation are not wired.

notes: Zeta Markets docs state the original Solana L1 venue ceased operating as of May 2025; this adapter keeps only audited legacy public data fixtures and explicit Unsupported boundaries.
